Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics News Coaches Additional Links

Scoreboard

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

9 Mario McDonnough

  • Position Guard
  • Height 5-10
  • Weight 160
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown West Palm Beach, FL
  • High School US Naval Academy Prep
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Moments

Biography

Prior to LMU:
- Named "Best of the Best" in Palm Beach County-(3 point shooter)
- Named "Best of the Best" in Palm Beach County (All-County as junior and senior)
- Palm Beach Post Honorable Mention Player of the Year as junior and senior
- Won District as a freshman and sophomore
- Varsity player all four years
- Season at NAPS, averaged: 21 points, 9 assists, 3 rebounds, 2 steals, 2.5 turnovers, 45% from the 3, 92% from FT, and 43% from FG

Family:
- Mario McDonnough (Father)
- Pamela Cosme (Mother)
- Cruz McDonnough (Younger brother)

Major:
- Sports Medicine

Previous schools:
- Palm Beach Central High School
- Naval Academy Prep School

Favorite food: 
- Chipotle

Favorite movie:
- Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

Favorite TV show:
- Vampire Diaries
